# What a senior recruiter would zero in on

## The bet
Pitch Alex as a multi-startup tech recruiter who's already hired ML/AI/infra engineers across FR/UK/DE — Mindflow is a direct analog of the Mistral team shape.

## The fear (HM perspective)
Two startups + agency. No 0→100 buildout. The risk: "great at filling a pipeline but hasn't scaled the function from scratch." The chat should ask how Alex would build outbound sourcing for ML researchers from day one.

## Cliché killer
"helped with employer branding" → owner-voice rewrite. The bullet at Mindflow currently undersells the work.

## Unspoken evidence
- Mindflow → AI workflow automation. Almost certainly hired ML engineers. CV says "engineering hiring across FR/UK/DE" but never names ML. Worth probing.
- Sourcery agency placed 32 engineers — likely several were AI/ML. Not stated.

## What the chat should NOT do
- Open on diversity sourcing. Mistral's offer mentions "diverse workforce" only in the values paragraph; the role itself is about ML/infra hiring at speed.
- Bundle Mindflow + Germinal + Sourcery into one question. They have different scopes; the recruiter at Mistral cares 80% about Mindflow.
- Ask about company stage / headcount / team size — that's editor metadata, collected post-chat.
